series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains manuals produced or obtained by agency personnel for internal personnel training or reference. Course curriculum and supporting documents for DPS developed training courses are retained under 760-1265, field training guides are retained under 760-0412, and employee training records are kept under 760-1538.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
